subcodes.first_line: O thou who art associated with the blessed Tree and beloved of the Blessed Beauty! A letter hath been received from 'Azízu'lláh Khán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منسوب شجره مبارکه و محبوب جمال مبارک نامه ای از عزیزالله خان رسید نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
